# zenflate public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenflate.txt 197 lines (supported surface) | zenflate.features.txt 0 added (features: alloc,avx512,compress,simd,std,threads,unchecked) | zenflate.internal.txt 8 lines (8 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## trait impls (14 types)

&[u8]: decompress::streaming::InputSource
Adler32Hasher: Clone, Debug, Default, Hasher
Crc32Hasher: Clone, Debug, Default, Hasher
compress::CompressionLevel: Clone, Copy, Debug, Default, Eq, Hash, PartialEq
compress::Compressor: Clone, Debug, Default
compress::CompressorSnapshot: Clone, Debug
decompress::DecompressOutcome: Clone, Copy, Debug, Eq, Hash, PartialEq
decompress::Decompressor: Debug, Default
decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>: Debug, decompress::streaming::InputSource
decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>: Debug
decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>: BufRead, Read
error::CompressionError: Clone, Copy, Debug, Display, Eq, Error, From<enough::reason::StopReason>, PartialEq
error::DecompressionError: Clone, Copy, Debug, Display, Eq, Error, From<enough::reason::StopReason>, PartialEq
error::StreamError<E>: Debug, Display, Error, From<error::DecompressionError>

## auto traits

9 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
error::StreamError<E>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
